name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: Roseville, CA's California Check Cashing Stores at 820 Sunrise Ave offers fast check cashing and financial services.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores at 820 Sunrise Ave in Roseville, CA provides convenient check cashing services in a standalone location. The Roseville branch is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, with Sunday hours closed. This location serves the Roseville community with extended weekday hours for residents and business owners.

The Roseville, CA location offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and other financial services. Call +1 916-773-2274 to speak with staff about rates, service options, or to verify services before visiting 820 Sunrise Ave.

When visiting the Roseville location, bring a valid photo ID and your check for the quickest service. California Check Cashing Stores at this location can process most common check types and provide multiple financial service options for Roseville residents.
pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3 listed) for convenient access
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday) accommodate working customers
Payday loan applications available both in-store and online
Offers Western Union money transfer and money orders at same locations
Green Dot reloadable debit card option for unbanked customers
Same-location bill pay service eliminates separate trips
cons: Payday loan maximum of only $250 is extremely limited for emergency cash needs
Fee structure and APR terms not disclosed on website; customers must visit in-store
Company's own disclaimer warns that small-dollar loans used long-term become expensive
No information provided about alternative products or credit-building options
Limited to check cashing and fringe banking services; not a traditional lending alternative
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked San Francisco residents needing immediate check cashing
Customers requiring bill payment or money transfer services in a single location
Workers seeking quick payday advances under $250 with same-day or next-day access
Individuals preparing taxes who need check cashing services at the same location
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for San Francisco residents who need immediate check-cashing services or quick payday advances under $250. The primary caveat is that the $250 loan cap is extremely limiting for genuine emergencies, and the company does not disclose fees or APR on its website, requiring in-person visits for pricing transparency.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
meta_description: California Check Cashing Stores at 820 Sunrise Ave, Roseville, CA. Fast check cashing and financial services.
